theme: Built and shipped a growing suite of AI-powered personal productivity and engineering workflow tools, including a skill architecture refactor that made all tools 4-5x faster to run.
highlights: Built a Claude-powered PR description generator that reads git diffs and drafts structured PR descriptions in configurable tone and format, saving ~15 minutes per PR
Shipped a performance review skill that mines GitHub contributions via the gh CLI, dispatches per-repo subagents in parallel, and synthesizes a narrative-driven review with business-impact framing
Built a meal planner skill with pantry-aware recipe generation that outputs a weekly meal plan with grocery list and optional Notion integration
Built a scrum board summarizer that pulls from Linear, groups by assignee/status, and generates standup-ready output in 10 seconds instead of 5 minutes of manual prep
Shipped a trading assistant options scanner combining Polygon and Yahoo Finance APIs with technical filters (RSI, IV rank, volume) to produce structured trade setups
Refactored the skill runner to support parallel subagent dispatch, making multi-agent skills like performance-review 4-5x faster
Built an eval harness for systematic skill quality measurement with configurable rubric dimensions; integrated with CI to catch regressions before merge
Shipped a market pulse skill that aggregates pre-market data, sector performance, VIX, and Fed calendar into a 60-second daily briefing
Added response caching for repeated Claude invocations and --format flag for markdown/JSON output across multiple skills
impact_statement: bhavik-ai is a living toolbox of AI-augmented workflows that compound productivity across engineering, personal finance, and daily routines. The eval harness and parallel skill architecture in particular represent foundational infrastructure improvements that make the entire system more reliable and faster to iterate on.
collaboration_notes: Reviewed 3 PRs including blocking a bounce-scanner implementation for incorrect volatility calculation logic.
